oneLineSummary: A full-stack workshop operations platform built to replace fragmented paper processes with centralised service, inventory, invoicing, and job-tracking workflows.

summary.systemDefinition: A production-oriented workshop management system for day-to-day vehicle service operations.
coreWorkflowsFeatures: Vehicle records, customer information, and workshop job tracking
WOF service records, invoices, purchase orders, and reminders
Integrated operational workflows across email, Xero, and internal business data
summary.businessOrOperationalImpact: The system reduces duplicate data entry, improves traceability, and supports more reliable workshop coordination across operational tasks.
summary.engineeringValue: It demonstrates practical full-stack delivery, workflow modelling, integration design, and deployment-ready engineering.

projectNarrative.problem: Paper-based workshop processes made tracking jobs, servicing history, purchasing, and communication harder to manage consistently.
projectNarrative.approach: I helped design and build a React, TypeScript, and .NET workflow platform that digitises the core workshop lifecycle and connects it to surrounding business systems.
projectNarrative.result: The platform created a more maintainable digital foundation for ongoing operational improvements, automation, and reporting.

engineeringHighlights: API-driven workflow architecture for workshop operations
Operational integrations spanning email, Xero, and internal data flows
Docker-based CI/CD support for Azure-hosted deployment workflows
Playwright coverage for critical end-to-end user journeys

reflection.tradeoffs: Balancing workflow flexibility with maintainable structure required clearer separation between UI state, business rules, and operational workflow status.
lessonsLearned: Real-world workflow software needs careful modelling before feature expansion.
Integration-heavy systems benefit from stronger delivery and testing discipline early.
Operational usability matters as much as technical correctness in internal tools.

display.heroImageAlt: NZAT workshop management system interface preview
display.libraryFocus: workflow digitisation, business process clarity, and delivery-ready architecture
